title: Rescinds the Cinematograph (Certification) (Amendment) Rules 1995 published under GSR 121
description: Rescinds the Cinematograph (Certification) (Amendment) Rules 1995 published under GSR 121
text: REGD. NO. D.L.—33004/95 The Gazette Of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY N o . 189] N E W D E L H I , F R I D A Y , A P R I L 2 8 , 1 9 9 5 / V A I S A K H A 8 , 1 9 1 7 993 GI/95 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 1 THE GA7ETTE OF INDIA , i:\TRAORDINARY |PAUT "—SEC H')i MINISTRY OF INFORMATION a BROADCASTING NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th April, 1995 G.S.R. 370(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 8 of the Cinematograph Act, 1952 (37 of 1952), the Central Government hereby res- cinds the Cinematograph (Certification) (Amendment) Rules 1995, published in the Part II Section 3(i) of the) Gazette of India at pags 535 dated 11th March 1995 under G.S.R. 121 with immediaie effect. [File No. 802|8|94-F(C)] SHARWAREE GOKHALE, Jt. Secy. Footnote' :—The principal rules werte published, vide No. G.S.R. 381(E) dated 9-5-83 in the Extraordinary Gazette of India, Part II, Section 3(i) and amended by : (i) GSR 83(E) dated 28-2-84; (ii) GSR 413(E) dated 29-5-S4; (iii) GSR 814(E) dated 13-12-84; (iv) GSR 772 dated 21-10-89; (v) GSR ^02(E) dated 27-11-91; (vi) GSR 67(E) daied 30-1-92; (vii) GSR (E) dated (viii) GSR 603|E dated 30-8-94; (ix) GSR 816|E dated 16-11-94; (x) GSR 816|E dated 16-11-94; (xi) GSR 121 dated 11-3-95.
